message: docs: Add README for hybrid Ghostty + WebKit app

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,131 @@
+# ZellApp - Hybrid Ghostty + WebKit Terminal
+
+A macOS app combining Ghostty's GPU-accelerated Metal terminal with a WebKit overlay for rich UI.
+
+## Architecture
+
+```
+┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
+│       WebKit Overlay (top layer)        │
+│  ┌───────────────────────────────────┐  │
+│  │     Transparent Hole Region       │  │
+│  │     (clicks pass to Ghostty)      │  │
+│  │                                   │  │
+│  │   ┌───────────────────────────┐   │  │
+│  │   │   Ghostty Metal Terminal  │   │  │
+│  │   │   (bottom layer - GPU)    │   │  │
+│  │   └───────────────────────────┘   │  │
+│  │                                   │  │
+│  └───────────────────────────────────┘  │
+│  [WebKit UI: input bar, buttons, etc]   │
+└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
+```
+
+### Why Hybrid?
+
+| Layer | Handles | Benefits |
+|-------|---------|----------|
+| **Ghostty** | Terminal rendering, shell, TUI apps | GPU Metal rendering, native escape codes, fast |
+| **WebKit** | Rich UI chrome | CSS styling, easy iteration, complex components |
+
+### Use Cases
+
+**TUI flows** (Ghostty):
+- CLI commands & output
+- vim/nano editing
+- Streaming LLM responses
+- Interactive prompts
+
+**HTML flows** (WebKit):
+- Chat input with rich formatting
+- Model selector dropdowns
+- Settings panels
+- Markdown preview
+
+## Prerequisites
+
+1. **Xcode 16+** with Command Line Tools
+2. **GhosttyKit.xcframework** - build from Ghostty source
+
+### Building GhosttyKit
+
+```bash
+# Clone Ghostty
+git clone https://github.com/ghostty-org/ghostty.git vendor/ghostty
+cd vendor/ghostty
+
+# Build xcframework
+zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+
+# Copy to app/Frameworks
+mkdir -p ../../app/Frameworks
+cp -r zig-out/macos/GhosttyKit.xcframework ../../app/Frameworks/
+```
+
+## Build & Run
+
+```bash
+cd app
+swift build
+.build/debug/ZellApp
+```
+
+## Project Structure
+
+```
+app/
+├── Package.swift                 # SPM config, links GhosttyKit
+├── Frameworks/
+│   └── GhosttyKit.xcframework/   # Ghostty Metal terminal (not in git)
+└── ZellApp/
+    ├── App/
+    │   ├── ZellApp.swift         # @main entry point
+    │   └── AppDelegate.swift     # App lifecycle
+    ├── Views/
+    │   ├── GhosttyTerminalView.swift   # Ghostty C API wrapper
+    │   └── HybridContainerView.swift   # Layer stack + WebKit overlay
+    └── Bridge/
+        └── ZellBridge.swift      # zell inference HTTP client
+```
+
+## Key Implementation Details
+
+### Hole Punching
+
+WebKit overlay has a transparent region. `hitTest(_:)` override returns `nil` for clicks inside the hole, passing them through to Ghostty underneath.
+
+```swift
+override func hitTest(_ point: NSPoint) -> NSView? {
+    if holeRect.contains(point) {
+        return nil  // Pass through to Ghostty
+    }
+    return super.hitTest(point)
+}
+```
+
+### JavaScript Bridge
+
+WebKit reports hole coordinates to Swift:
+
+```javascript
+window.webkit.messageHandlers.holePunch.postMessage({
+    x: rect.left,
+    y: rect.top,
+    width: rect.width,
+    height: rect.height
+});
+```
+
+### Ghostty Initialization
+
+```swift
+ghostty_init(0, nil)                    // Initialize runtime
+let config = ghostty_config_new()       // Create config
+ghostty_config_finalize(config)         // Finalize
+let app = ghostty_app_new(&runtime, config)  // Create app
+let surface = ghostty_surface_new(app, &surfaceConfig)  // Create surface
+```
+
+## License
+
+MIT
